steps.title: Read the age clue
steps.content: The narrator says that “a safe guess would have placed him somewhere” between forty and fifty. A guess about someone's age does not physically put that person anywhere; it judges an approximate point on an age range.

steps.title: Match the judgment meaning
steps.content: Choice B means made an agreement or shrank, which does not fit age. Choice C means modified for a new use. Choice D means organized or positioned physically. The word needed here means approximated by judgment. The answer is A.
